calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Off Calendar

Joint (Stipulated) Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARY'S GONE CRACKERS, INC.'S Joint (Stipulated) Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Settlement.

The Parties' Joint (Stipulated) Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Settlement is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court will enter judgment in the form provided in the proposed judgment submitted and served with the moving papers.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)
